title: zeylanidium lichenoides
intro: Zeylanidium lichenoides, also known as the Sri Lankan or Ceylonese tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Menispermaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, primarily for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zeylanidium lichenoides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into various herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various health conditions.
